# NutNet Weights

These autoencoder weights were downloaded from the upstream NutNet repository:

https://github.com/0502tonylin/NutNet/tree/main/ae_weights_

They are used by `experiments/robot/libero/run_libero_vla_gui_attack_nutnet.py`.
